name: Oreo Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Gradually add in the sugar and beat for 3 minutes.
3. Mix in the flour while continuing to beat.
4. Add the eggs and yolks, beating until well combined.
5. Stir in the whipping cream and vanilla extract.
6. Pour half of the mixture into the crust.
7. Sprinkle with crushed Oreos.
8. Add the remaining filling.
9. Place the pan in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 15 minutes.
10. Reduce the temperature to 225°F (110°C) and bake for an additional 50 minutes.
11. Turn off the heat and set the oven to 350°F (175°C).
12. Stir together the sour cream, sugar, and vanilla extract.
13. Spread over the cake and return it to the oven.
14. Bake for an additional 7 minutes.
15. Remove from the oven and allow to cool to room temperature in a draft-free place.
16. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight or up to 3 days.
17. Before serving, remove the sides of the pan and serve chilled.
